meanings.definition: come between so as to be hindrance or obstacle
examples: Your talking interferes with my work!

meanings.definition: get involved, so as to alter or hinder an action, or through force or threat of force
examples: Why did the U.S. not intervene earlier in WW II?

meanings.definition: intrusive in a meddling or offensive manner
examples: bustling about self-importantly making an officious nuisance of himself
